framework.name: Stripe Radar integration for agent fraud detection
framework.description: SPTs integrate with Stripe Radar to relay risk signals including likelihood of fraudulent disputes, card testing, stolen cards, issuer declines. Designed to 'help differentiate between high-intent agents and low-trust automated bots' using transaction and payment method details.
framework.raw_quote: SPTs are powered by Stripe Radar and can relay the underlying risk signals using transaction and payment method details—including the likelihood of a fraudulent dispute, card testing, a stolen card, a card issuer decline, and other signals—that help differentiate between high-intent agents and low-trust automated bots.

source.title: Introducing our agentic commerce solutions - Stripe
